narrative:
Precinct Upper 4 (precinct in Lawrence County) has 347 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.3 percentage points.
